channel.title: Azure Observability on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Observability on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: 📊 Monitor AI Coding Agents with Grafana
item.description: AI coding agents are now a real line item in most engineering budgets. GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and the next thing your team installs all generate tokens, calls, latency, and cost — but very little of that is visible unless you wire it up. The Azure Managed Grafana team has now published a ready-made path to do exactly that, using OpenTelemetry, Application Insights, and a small set of curated dashboards.
